[[File:Keris partisan of corruption detail.png|left|150px]]
The '''keris partisan of corruption''' is a one-handed spear requiring 80 [[Attack]] to equip. It is made by attaching the [[eye of the corruptor]] on the [[keris partisan]], granting it a special attack which can only be used within the [[Tombs of Amascut]] [[raid]]. As with the keris partisan, weapon poisons cannot be applied to the partisan.

The keris partisan of corruption retains the effects of the keris partisan, dealing 33% bonus damage against all [[kalphite (attribute)|kalphite]]s and [[scabarites]], alongside a 1/51 chance of finding a gap in their exoskeleton, dealing triple damage. When this special effect occurs, the chatbox will display the message: {{mes|You slip your weapon through a gap in the creature's chitin, landing a vicious blow.}}

==Special attack==
[[File:Wrath of Amascut.gif|thumb|250px|A player performing the Keris partisan of corruption 's special attack, ''Wrath of Amascut''.]]
The keris partisan of corruption has a [[special attacks|special attack]], ''Wrath of Amascut'', which consumes 75% of the player's special attack energy. The special attack, for the next hit, provides a 100% increase to accuracy and a 25% increase to the player's damage.

The target hit by the special attack will also receive 25% increased damage for 10 [[ticks]] (6 seconds); the special attack must be a [[successful hit]] in order for it to take effect. However, players performing the special attack will be unable to attack for 8 ticks (4.8 seconds). As such, it is recommended to have teammates focus on the target hit by the special attack afterwards if possible.

==Changes==
{{Subject changes header}}
{{Subject changes
|date = 20 March 2024
|update = Varlamore: Part One
|change = Players may no longer attach jewels obtained from the [[Tombs of Amascut]] to a wielded keris partisan if they do not have level 80 Attack.
}}
{{Subject changes
|date = 21 September 2022
|update = Tombs of Amascut Changes & Beta Tweaks
|change = When players deal a critical hit to kalphites and scabarites with the keris partisan, the chat message was updated from "''You slip your weapon through a chink in the creature's chitin, landing a vicious blow.''" to "''You slip your weapon through a gap in the creature's chitin, landing a vicious blow.''"
}}
{{Subject changes footer}}

==Trivia==
* Originally, the keris partisan of corruption did not have a special attack. Rather, the partisan would add a damage-over-time effect to attacked enemies. Players wouldn't be able to stack this effect multiple times onto a single NPC, but would have been able to apply it to multiple NPCs at once.
